mapper.select: SELECT i.*, dis.discnt_nm AS discnt_nm, ste.site_nm AS site_nm, cd_dit.code_label AS target_type_cd_nm FROM pm_discnt_item i LEFT JOIN pm_discnt dis ON dis.discnt_id = i.discnt_id LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = i.site_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_dit ON cd_dit.code_grp = 'DISCNT_ITEM_TARGET' AND cd_dit.code_value = i.target_type_cd WHERE i.discnt_item_id = #{id}
